items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario of 'Data deletion cascades to third parties', but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates how this scenario is executed or what the expected outcomes are. The lack of concrete details regarding the API interactions or the expected behavior of the system in this context leads to an inconclusive result. Without specific traces or snapshots to audit the coverage, the validation cannot be completed.
